values.content:
=You are a warm, professional dental clinic assistant for PureSmile Dental Hospital in Lagos.

Write a short, friendly reactivation email body (3-4 sentences max) for a patient who hasn't visited in over 6 months.

Patient details:
- Name: {{ $json['First Name'] }}
- Last service: {{ $json['Service'] }}
- Last visit: {{ $json['Last Notified At'] }}

Rules:
- Address them by first name
- Reference their last treatment naturally
- Keep it warm, not pushy
- End with a gentle call to action to book again
- Do NOT include subject line, greetings like "Dear", or sign-offs
- Return plain text only, no HTML tags

You are a senior patient coordinator at PureSmile Dental. Your communication style is professional, warm, and highly personalized. Your goal is to re-engage patients who haven't visited in 6+ months by making them feel valued, not like just another number in a database.

parameters.subject: Reminder To Book Your Appointment
parameters.message:
=
PureSmile FOLLOWING UP

Hi {{ $json['First Name'] }},

We noticed you haven't booked your first appointment yet — and we just wanted to check in. No pressure at all, but we'd hate for you to miss out on getting that smile sorted.

Your new patient offer is still waiting

As a new patient, your first consultation includes a full dental assessment and personalised treatment plan — completely free.

✓ Full oral health assessment included

✓ No obligation, no hidden fees

✓ Available 6 days a week

Still unsure? Here's what one of our recent new patients had to say:

"I kept putting it off for months. I finally booked and wish I had done it sooner. The whole team was so warm and professional — nothing like I expected."

— Emeka T., new patient · Orthodontics

Ready when you are. It only takes 2 minutes to pick a slot.

Book my free consultation Call us instead

Slots fill up fast — especially on weekends.

You're receiving this because you contacted PureSmile.

PureSmile · Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

parameters.subject: Appointment Cancelled
parameters.message:
=

Appointment Cancelled

PureSmile Dental Clinic

STATUS: CANCELLED

Hi {{ $('Booking Check ').item.json['First Name'] }},

This email confirms that your {{ $('Booking Check ').item.json.Service }} appointment has been successfully cancelled. We're sorry we won't see you then, but we'd love to have you back when you're ready.

PREVIOUS DATE {{ $('Booking Check ').item.json['Preffered Date'] }}
PREVIOUS TIME {{ $('Booking Check ').item.json['Preffered Time'] }}
Reschedule Now

Questions? Call us at +234 000 000 0000

You are receiving this because an appointment associated with this email was cancelled. If you did not request this, please contact us immediately.

PureSmile • 14 Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1

parameters.subject: Last Reminder
parameters.message:
=
PureSmile LAST REMINDER
This is our final check-in

Hi {{ $json['First Name'] }},

We reached out a few days ago and wanted to try one more time — because your smile is worth it.

"A check-up today prevents a problem tomorrow."

It's been a while since your last {{ $json.Service }} visit. A quick check-up can catch small issues before they become costly ones.

✓ Full check-up in under 30 minutes
✓ Early detection saves money long-term
✓ Same trusted team, same warm environment
Book my check-up now

Prefer to call? +234 000 000 0000

If you'd prefer not to hear from us again, unsubscribe here.

PureSmile Dental · 14 Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

parameters.subject: =🆕 New patient enquiry —  {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.first_name }}{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json['Last Name'] }}
parameters.message:
=

New patient enquiry

Action required — create Dentrix record

 NEW LEAD

A new patient has submitted an enquiry through the website. Please create their record in Dentrix and update the Google Sheet with their Patient ID.

FULL NAME {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.first_name }}{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json['Last Name'] }}
EMAIL {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.email }}
PHONE {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Number }}
SERVICE {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.service }}
PREF. DATE {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.preffered_date }}
SUBMITTED {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.submitted_at }}

PATIENT MESSAGE

"{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.Message }}"

Your action checklist:

1 Call or email the patient to confirm their preferred appointment date
2 Create their record in Dentrix and copy their Patient ID
3 Paste the Patient ID into the Patient ID column in the Google Sheet and update Status to booked
Open Google Sheet Email patient

This notification was sent automatically by PureSmile n8n automation when a new patient submitted the website form.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ PureSmile workflow failed —  {{ $json['node_name '] }}
parameters.message:
=

⚠️ Workflow failure detected

PureSmile Automation Alert

A workflow has failed and needs your attention. Here are the details:

WORKFLOW {{ $json.workflow_name }}
FAILED NODE {{ $json['node_name '] }}
ERROR {{ $json.error_message }}
TIME {{ $json.failed_at }}
EXECUTION ID {{ $json.execution_id }}

What to do next:

1. Log into n8n and open the Executions tab

2. Find execution ID {{ $json.execution_id }}

3. Click Retry to re-run from the failed node

Open n8n dashboard

This is an automated alert from PureSmile n8n automation.

parameters.content:
## Workflow 1
 Webhook → Edit Fields → Append to Sheets → Welcome Email → Staff Notification → Wait 3 days → IF check → Day 3 follow-up [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## Data Flow Overview
Patient submits website form  →  Lead saved to Sheets  →  Welcome email  →  Staff notified  →  Patient fills Google Form  →  Booking confirmed  →  24hr reminder  →  Appointment attended  →  6 months later: AI reactivation. [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

parameters.subject: Appointment confirmed!
parameters.message:
=

Appointment confirmed!

PureSmile

✓

You're all booked in, {{ $json['First Name'] }}

We'll send you a reminder 24 hours before your visit.
BOOKING CONFIRMED

Hi {{ $json['First Name'] }},

Great news — your appointment has been confirmed. Here are your booking details:

DATE {{ $json['Preffered Date'] }}
TIME {{ $json['Preffered Time'] }}
SERVICE {{ $json.Service }}
LOCATION 14 Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
📅

Don't forget your appointment.

Add to Google Calendar →

PureSmile Dental · 14 Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1, Lagos

parameters.content:
## Workflow 2
 Schedule Trigger → Get Rows → Filter 24hr → Switch → Code → First Reminder → Wait 2hr → Check Confirmed → Second Reminder → Cancel  [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

### SUB Workflow 
 Webhook Trigger → Booking Confirmed

### SUB Workflow 
 Webhook Trigger → Booking Cancelled

## Workflow 4
 Schedule Trigger → Date & Time → Get All Rows → Filter 6-month inactive → Loop → OpenAI → Email 1 → Update Sheets → Wait 5 days → Email 2 → Dormant [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)

## Error Handler 
Error Handler — Error Trigger → Extract Details → Send Alert Email to Admins/components/sticky-notes/)

## Workflow 3
 Google Form Trigger → Update Sheets → Get Patient Details → Send Confirmation Email [Guide](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/sticky-notes/)
